en_title: Faye’s Story So Far and Why You Won’t Be Playing as Kratos in God of War Laufey
cn_title: 《战神：劳菲》主角确认非奎托斯，菲的故事将展开
subtitle: 新篇章，新视角
opus_summary: 圣莫妮卡工作室确认《战神：劳菲》并非前传，玩家将扮演菲在死后世界展开冒险。创意总监Cory Barlog透露，早在2018年《战神》中就已埋下伏笔。菲曾与索尔大战，实力不输奎托斯，战斗风格更灵活敏捷。游戏将于PS5平台发售。

paragraphs.en: Warning: Full spoilers for God of War and God of War Ragnarok follow.
paragraphs.cn: 警告：以下内容包含《战神》和《战神：诸神黄昏》的完整剧透。

paragraphs.en: Faye is Laufey; let’s get any confusion there may be over that out of the way. Mother to Atreus and second wife of Kratos, she went by the alias Faye when she and her family were forced into hiding from the gods. Though only seen as a corpse in God of War 2018, she plays a significant part in its, and its sequel, God of War Ragnarok’s, story.
paragraphs.cn: 菲就是劳菲——先把可能存在的混淆说清楚。她是阿特柔斯的母亲、奎托斯的第二任妻子，在全家被迫躲避众神时化名菲。虽然在2018年的《战神》中她仅以尸体现身，但在该作及其续作《战神：诸神黄昏》的故事中，她都扮演着重要角色。

paragraphs.en: “She's always been a character I wanted to expand on more,” says Cory Barlog, creative director at Santa Monica Studio, and director of 2018’s God of War. “As we continue to expand it and show more and more of what the universe of God of War is all about, these key pivotal characters play a role, not only in what has happened, but what will happen.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我一直想对这个角色进行更多拓展，」圣莫妮卡工作室创意总监、2018年《战神》导演Cory Barlog说道，「随着我们不断扩展《战神》宇宙，展现其更多面貌，这些关键角色不仅在已发生的故事中发挥作用，也将影响未来的走向。」

paragraphs.en: Before we speculate on the future, though, let’s catch you up on how Faye helped Kratos and Atreus to scatter her ashes on the tallest peak in all of the realms. A warrior giant from Jötunheim, Faye kept this secret history hidden from her family, and it isn’t until Mimir reveals that she was known as Laufey the Just in her homeland that Kratos realises that he’s essentially the whole journey of the 2018 game serves as taking her home to rest.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，在推测未来之前，我们先回顾一下菲如何帮助奎托斯和阿特柔斯将她的骨灰撒在九界最高峰。作为来自约顿海姆的巨人战士，菲向家人隐瞒了这段秘密历史。直到密米尔透露她在故乡被称为「公正的劳菲」时，奎托斯才意识到——2018年游戏的全部旅程，本质上就是送她回家安息。

paragraphs.en: Those gold markings you’ve been following the whole time to clamber up ledges and swing across gaps? Well, they were painted long ago by Faye, who had the foresight to see their adventure coming. Time, and how the past and future intertwine, works in very weird ways in Norse mythology, in case you didn’t know. Loki is the father of the ancient World Serpent, Jörmungandr, for example. But we simply don’t have time to go into that here.
paragraphs.cn: 那些你一路跟着攀爬岩壁、荡过缝隙的金色标记？它们其实是菲很久以前画下的，她早已预见到这场冒险的到来。时间以及过去与未来的交织，在北欧神话中以非常奇特的方式运作——比如，洛基是远古巨蛇耶梦加得的父亲。但我们这里没时间细说了。

paragraphs.en: Loki is, of course, the name that Faye wanted to give to Atreus upon his birth, before Kratos stepped in. She would then go on to raise her son and teach him the languages of the nine realms, how to fight, and even make him his trusty bow, until her passing. Those skills come in very handy as Atreus and Kratos finally reach Jötunheim and uncover a mural painted by Faye, depicting what the future has in store for them, in what becomes the story of God of War Ragnarok.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，洛基是菲原本想给阿特柔斯取的名字，后来被奎托斯否决了。之后她抚养儿子，教他九界语言、战斗技巧，甚至为他制作了那把可靠的弓，直到她去世。这些技能在阿特柔斯和奎托斯最终抵达约顿海姆、发现菲绘制的壁画时派上了大用场——那幅壁画描绘了他们的未来，也构成了《战神：诸神黄昏》的故事。

paragraphs.en: In that sequel, we do actually see and hear from Faye, albeit in dream sequences born out of Kratos’ apprehension over their son’s apocalyptic fate. Portrayed by Daredevil’s Deborah Ann Wolf, who reprises the role in God of War Laufey, she helps to soften Kratos to the world around him, using the words “to grieve deeply is to have loved fully” in a beautiful piece of scripting.
paragraphs.cn: 在那部续作中，我们确实看到了菲、听到了她的声音——尽管是在奎托斯对儿子末日命运的忧虑所催生的梦境中。由《超胆侠》的Deborah Ann Wolf饰演（她将在《战神：劳菲》中继续扮演该角色），菲用一句优美的台词「深切的悲伤源于完整的爱」帮助奎托斯对周围世界变得柔和。

paragraphs.en: But what about Faye’s future in God of War Laufey? Confirmed not to be a prequel to the two previous Kratos games, we’re set to join her in the afterlife on her own adventure. “Even back in 2018, we started building all this,” Barlog reveals. “We were setting tiny little narrative beats that were going to start to structurally support this growth of the universe. What happens to God’s when they die?” That question is one that God of War Laufey will seemingly try to answer.
paragraphs.cn: 那么菲在《战神：劳菲》中的未来呢？已确认该作并非前两部奎托斯游戏的前传，我们将跟随她在死后世界展开自己的冒险。「早在2018年，我们就开始构建这一切，」Barlog透露，「我们埋下了微小的叙事节拍，它们将开始从结构上支撑这个宇宙的成长。神死后会发生什么？」这个问题似乎正是《战神：劳菲》试图回答的。

paragraphs.en: We know Faye can handle herself. Kratos discovers late in God of War Ragnarok that she once battled Thor in Vanaheim, with a whole valley torn apart by the clash between Mjolnir and the Leviathan Axe, which her husband would inherit.
paragraphs.cn: 我们知道菲有能力自保。奎托斯在《战神：诸神黄昏》后期发现，她曾在华纳海姆与索尔交战，雷神之锤与利维坦之斧（后来由她丈夫继承）的碰撞将整个山谷撕裂。

paragraphs.en: “She's not quite as solidly built a brick wall as Kratos is, but she's every bit as much of a warrior,” says Ariel Lawrence, the game’s director. “So for her, lean into that agility, that flexibility, the speed, while still maintaining how deadly she is, I think for us that was really a key spot to hone into. The fluidity of the Greek saga, but the up close and gritty personal of the Nord saga, and marry those together in something that's really uniquely Faye. I think Faye is really a little bit more comfortable with magic as well.”
paragraphs.cn: 「她不像奎托斯那样像一堵砖墙般坚实，但她同样是一名战士，」游戏总监Ariel Lawrence说，「所以对她来说，发挥那种敏捷、灵活和速度，同时保持她的致命性，我认为这是我们真正需要打磨的关键点。希腊神话的流畅性，加上北欧神话的近距离 gritty 个人风格，将它们融合成真正独特的菲。我觉得菲对魔法也更得心应手一些。」

paragraphs.en: It looks like Santa Monica is sticking to what has made fans fall in love with the most recent God of War saga, but shifting to a new perspective that will unlock new layers to this world. It’s exciting and refreshing to see a PlayStation Studio not rest on its laurels and give us a straightforward sequel to what came before, but ask new questions and keep us hungry for the answers.
paragraphs.cn: 看起来圣莫妮卡工作室在坚持让粉丝爱上最新《战神》系列的那些元素的同时，转向了一个新的视角，将解锁这个世界的全新层次。看到一家PlayStation工作室不满足于现状、不给我们一个简单的续作，而是提出新的问题、让我们渴望答案，这令人兴奋且耳目一新。

paragraphs.en: “I think for Faye, we're getting to the point in the God of War franchise where we can start telling stories about more characters,” Lawrence explains. “And for us, Faye has always really been the starting point for Kratos and Atreus on their journey, and really getting to know her as a character, fully as a three-dimensional human has been really important to us. It started, really, in 2018. Just who was this woman who was a match equal to Kratos?”
paragraphs.cn: 「我认为对于菲来说，《战神》系列已经到了我们可以开始讲述更多角色故事的阶段，」Lawrence解释道，「对我们而言，菲一直是奎托斯和阿特柔斯旅程的起点，真正了解她这个角色、作为一个立体的完整的人，对我们来说非常重要。这其实始于2018年。这个能与奎托斯匹敌的女人，究竟是谁？」

paragraphs.en: It’s something we’ll all be able to find out for ourselves soon when God of War Laufey arrives on PS5.
paragraphs.cn: 当《战神：劳菲》登陆PS5时，我们很快就能亲自找到答案了。

manual_approved_issues.detail: source contains 'Persona', but required dictionary translation '女神异闻录' is missing
